data.markdown:
# Louvre Abu Dhabi

Louvre Abu Dhabi is a universal museum on Saadiyat Island, displaying art and artefacts that span human civilisation. The museum is open Tuesday - Sunday from 10:00 am - 6:30 pm and is closed on Mondays. Admission is AED 63 for adults, with free entry for children under a set age. The iconic dome creates a celebrated 'rain of light' effect over the galleries.

metadata.title: Louvre Abu Dhabi — Plan Your Visit
